summary: Code review and frontend testing of Congrats Card modal keyboard fix. Code structure verified correct but unable to fully test UI interaction due to pre-existing thread page loading issue.

integration_issues.issue: Messages not loading - page stuck in infinite loading state despite API returning valid data. This is a PRE-EXISTING issue, not related to Congrats Card fix.

action_items: Investigate thread message loading issue - API works (/api/messages/thread/{id} returns data) but frontend never exits loading state
Congrats Card modal fix appears structurally correct but needs UI verification once thread loading is fixed
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Congrats Card modal KeyboardAvoidingView implementation is correct with behavior prop for iOS/Android
GOOD: Modal uses justifyContent: 'flex-end' for proper bottom-sheet positioning
GOOD: Backdrop is separated from modal content using absoluteFillObject
GOOD: ScrollView has keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' for proper input handling
GOOD: Modal has maxHeight: '80%' leaving room for keyboard
GOOD: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
ISSUE: Thread ensureConversation() may have race condition - user._id check may not re-trigger when user loads

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Page loads, modal structure correct, but can't test interaction due to thread loading issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Congrats Card modal fix (keyboard covering input) - the code structure looks correct: uses KeyboardAvoidingView wrapping the modal content, positions from bottom with flex-end, separates backdrop. However, testing was blocked by thread page messages not loading (infinite spinner). The API at /api/messages/thread/{conversation_id} returns valid data but the frontend never shows messages. This appears to be a pre-existing issue with the ensureConversation() effect not triggering properly. Next tester should investigate the useEffect dependency array at line 196-198.

congrats_card_modal_fix_review.keyboard_avoiding_view: IMPLEMENTED - Wraps modal with behavior prop for iOS/Android
congrats_card_modal_fix_review.backdrop_separation: IMPLEMENTED - Uses absoluteFillObject for touchable backdrop
congrats_card_modal_fix_review.max_height: IMPLEMENTED - maxHeight: '80%' leaves room for keyboard
congrats_card_modal_fix_review.test_ids: IMPLEMENTED - All 5 interactive elements have data-testid

thread_loading_issue.potential_cause: ensureConversation() useEffect may not trigger when user state loads asynchronously
